answer:
Absolutely, one thing that really comes to mind is my cooking. You know, when I first started out, it was kind of a disaster. I mean, I could barely boil an egg without making a mess. But over time, and with a lot of practice, I really improved my skills. I decided to challenge myself by trying new recipes every week. Some were hits, while others, well, let’s just say they went straight to the trash. 

But, as I kept at it, I began to understand flavors and techniques better. I learned about seasoning and how to properly chop vegetables. I could whip up a pasta dish or a stir-fry without even needing a recipe. It's honestly such a rewarding feeling to see your progress. Friends and family have even complimented my cooking now, which is pretty cool. 

Now, I love hosting dinner parties and experimenting with different cuisines. It’s like a fun little adventure every time I step into the kitchen. So yeah, practice really does make perfect, and cooking has turned into one of my favorite hobbies. It's amazing how far I've come!
title: Tell me about something you got better at with practice.
extData:
{"pronuncFile":"/20250225/1bf432651c5d43b48a57acaa72280cf1.mp3","answerTemplate":"开场陈述：  
“Practice is essential for improvement, and one area where I have seen significant progress is in [specific skill or activity].”

正文：  
最初的困难：  
“When I first started [skill or activity], I faced numerous challenges such as [describe a specific difficulty or limitation you encountered].”  
“At that time, I felt [describe your feelings about your progress, like frustration or loss of confidence].”

练习的作用：  
“However, with consistent practice, I began to notice changes. I dedicated [amount of time or frequency] to [practice method or activity].”  
“This approach allowed me to [mention a specific improvement, like gaining confidence or mastering techniques].”

具体的进步例子：  
“For example, [describe a particular instance when you demonstrated improvement]. This experience made me realize that [insight gained from the experience].”

结论：  
“In conclusion, through dedication and practice, I have transformed my skills in [skill or activity] from [initial state] to [current state].”  
“Ultimately, this journey has taught me that [final thought on the value of practice and persistence].”","titleTranslate":"请告诉我你通过练习变得更擅长的事情。"}
